evidence: 6-expert council covers all 8 coverage axes: web search (Rabbany), evidence verification (Hanselowski, Augenstein, Atanasova, Nakov), source credibility (Rabbany), multi-provider aggregation (Hanselowski, Rabbany), claim classification (Augenstein, Atanasova, Nakov), MCP integration (Soria Parra), information extraction (Atanasova, Augenstein + readability heuristic), confidence calibration (Hanselowski, Atanasova)
Soria Parra's expertise directly covers MCP specification, tool schemas, agent runtime integration, and transport design -- closing the previously-flagged breadth gap on axis 6
Information extraction (axis 7) now has both Atanasova/Augenstein expertise AND a concrete readability-style implementation in browse_page.py
All 6 experts have complete profiles, reasoning kernels, distillate.md, and source dossiers
gaps: Production deployment / SRE / latency expertise remains without a dedicated expert
Adversarial robustness of credibility scoring and search result manipulation is a cross-cutting blind spot
axes.improvement_from_iteration_3: +1 point (20→21). Soria Parra's expertise now fully integrated into scoring. Minor improvement reflects consolidation rather than new coverage.

evidence: Soria Parra's profile includes 5 signature ideas, 4 core questions, 5 anti-patterns, 4 best-used-for entries, and 5 preferred evidence types
Rabbany remains deepest with 6 canonical works, 8 signature ideas, 6-item reasoning kernels
Hanselowski has 5 playbook entries (richest playbook), 3 quote bank entries, 5 preferred_evidence types
All 6 experts have distillate.md files with career arcs, reasoning kernels, and what-this-expert-will-catch sections
gaps: No profile reaches 23-25 (authoritative standalone reference work level)
Soria Parra's quote bank needs more verbatim quotes from public interviews
axes.improvement_from_iteration_3: +1 point (20→21). Consolidation improvement. Soria Parra's profile adds depth on the MCP axis.

evidence: 83 tests passing (was 78; added 5 new tests: 4 circuit breaker + 1 baseline comparison)
Ruff linting in CI with E/F/W/I/UP rules -- all checks pass
Pyright type checking in CI with basic mode -- 0 errors
Coverage.py in CI with 84% line coverage (threshold: 80%)

Circuit breaker pattern implemented for provider calls: _provider_is_tripped(), _record_provider_failure(), _record_provider_success() with CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD=3 and CIRCUIT_BREAKER_RESET_SECONDS=60
Readability-style main content detection in browse_page.py: _score_candidate(), _find_main_content()
ThreadPoolExecutor for concurrent provider calls, retry logic with exponential backoff
Source.extra typed as dict with field(default_factory=dict) -- eliminates optional access errors
gaps: No async/await implementation; concurrent execution relies on threads
No structured logging or monitoring hooks for production deployment
browse_page readability heuristic not validated against diverse real-world pages
axes.improvement_from_iteration_3: +1 point (22→23). Circuit breaker, coverage enforcement, and baseline heuristics add meaningful thickness. Coverage measurement is a significant quality gate.

evidence: Sub-claim verification issues targeted sub-queries (self.search(query=sub, ...)) -- highest-impact single improvement
Baseline comparison heuristics (majority-vote, keyword-count) now included in evidence_report analysis output, allowing users to compare against the weighted overlap model
Circuit breaker prevents cascading provider failures, maintaining search effectiveness under degraded conditions
Readability-style content extraction reduces noise from nav/header/footer, improving page-aware verification quality
Coverage.py enforcement at 80% minimum prevents regression of untested code
Sub-claim verdicts use the same weighted scoring thresholds as parent claims
gaps: Claim decomposition is rule-based (regex) and does not handle complex sentence structures, conditional claims, or negation scope
No NLP-based stance detection, sentence similarity, or entailment reasoning
No confidence calibration against a gold-standard dataset
Baselines are reported but not benchmarked against a labeled dataset to quantify improvement
axes.improvement_from_iteration_3: +2 points (21→23). Baseline comparison heuristics in evidence_report provide transparency and enable effectiveness validation. Circuit breaker adds resilience. Coverage enforcement prevents regression.

weighted_median_calculation_notes.normalization_note: Raw weights {0.25, 0.20, 0.17, 0.17, 0.17, 0.17} normalized to sum to 1.0
weighted_median_calculation_notes.median_method: Weighted median computed by sorting votes, accumulating weights, and finding the value where cumulative weight crosses 0.5

recommendations: EFFECTIVENESS: Add structured logging with configurable log levels to enable production monitoring and debugging.
BREADTH/DEPTH: Consider adding a production/SRE specialist for adversarial robustness and latency expertise.
THICKNESS: Add async/await for provider calls to improve concurrent execution efficiency.
DEPTH: Add verbatim quotes from Soria Parra's public interviews to the quote bank.
EFFECTIVENESS: Consider adding a simple NLP stance classifier (even a zero-shot model) as an optional enhancement to the keyword overlap heuristic.
